name: research-deliberation
description: Probe available AI CLIs, assign model-bound roles, reconcile independent views, and produce an evidence-based executable plan.

acceptance.description: Only models that passed a safe semantic CLI probe were included as active participants.
Every active participant has a model-bound role; equivalent roles may be assigned across different brands.
Reviewers received bounded questions without the intended answer.
The root reconciled contradictions against evidence rather than votes.
The final plan gives every step an owner, dependencies, validation, and rollback.
The final summary used the highest-ranked active arbiter in the configured fallback order, or failed closed.
